name: Executor Discharge from Personal Liability

eligibility.description: Available to executors or administrators of a decedent's estate who have filed the required tax returns and wish to limit their personal financial exposure to future tax deficiencies.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an executor to request a discharge from personal liability for the decedent's income and gift taxes by filing a written application after the tax return is filed.
